subcodes.title: Words to the Eastern pilgrims, spoken on 1913-06-28
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God that you have crossed the mountains and deserts, the lands and the seas and attained to the visit of the Holy Tomb with joy and fragrance.
subcodes.subjects: @Shrines and Holy places, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @radiant countenance; bearing the divine fragrance, @law of pilgrimage, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @Holy Days and the Baha'i calendar
